retry_reason: put_device is void and always succeeds; if pointer is NULL the operation is a no-op, no failure to retry.
contract_summary: This is a put-wrapper for two amplifier devices (amp_dev1, amp_dev2) stored in the card's private context. It removes any associated software nodes and then drops the device references acquired earlier (e.g., during probe). The function always succeeds and returns 0. After calling this function, the caller must not use the devices again and must not call put_device again on them. The wrapper safely handles NULL pointers (no-op if a device was never initialized).

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to release device references via put_device (and remove associated software nodes) during cleanup; no other business logic.
